description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ansible/ansible:centos7 Docker image with a docker:dind service and a global before_script that removes write permissions from the project directory and tests folder, installs Docker via get.docker.com, and installs ansible, ansible-lint and docker-py with pip, then changes to the tests directory. Define two stages: check and tests. In the check stage add three jobs: check_dist runs `ansible-playbook --syntax-check test_docker_distrib.yml`; check_std runs `ansible-playbook --syntax-check test_docker_install.yml`; lint runs `ansible-lint *.yml`. In the tests stage add two jobs: distributed runs `ansible-playbook test_docker_distrib.yml -v -e "minio_port=9000"`, then `echo "idempotence test"`, then `ansible-playbook test_docker_distrib.yml -e "minio_port=9000"`, and finally `tail ansible.log | grep 'minio.*changed=0.*unreachable=0.*failed=0'`. standalone runs the same sequence but with `test_docker_install.yml` instead of the distrib playbook.
